mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_number, o.user_id, o.total_amount, o.status, o.shipping_address, o.created_at, o.updated_at
o.id, o.order_number, o.user_id, u.username, o.total_amount, o.status, o.shipping_address, o.created_at, o.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM orders o WHERE o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.created_at ASC, o.id ASC
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, o.id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_number = #{orderNumber}, user_id = #{userId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status}, shipping_address = #{shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT NVL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE status != 'CANCELLED'
